title: getLabel()
text: getLabel() Returns the uniface.Label object that represents the Field's label. Return = Field . getLabel () Arguments None Return value Return uniface.Label object representing the label of this Field. Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Example: Setting the Label of a Field Explain this code var vInstance = uniface.getInstance("MY_DSP"); var vEntity = vInstance.getEntity("ORDER.ACME"); var vOcc = vEntity.getOccurrence(0); var vField = vOcc.getField("CUSTOMER"); // Set the label of field CUSTOMER var vLabel = vField.getLabel() // Same as vOcc.getLabel("CUSTOMER") vLabel.setValue("Client: ") Copy Related Links uniface.Field The uniface.Field object provides access to selected properties of the field that it represents. It is returned by the getField function of uniface.Occurrence. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
